recipes.name: PUNJABI CHHOLE
recipes.description: Authentic Punjabi Chhole made with Zenzaika Chhole Masala
instructions: Boil Chhole
1. Add soaked chickpeas, salt, and water in a cooker.
2. Cook for 6–7 whistles until soft.
Cooking
1. Heat oil and ghee in a pan.
2. Add whole spices and sauté.
3. Add chopped onion and cook till golden.
4. Add ginger garlic paste and cook briefly.
5. Add tomato puree and cook till oil separates.
6. Add turmeric, coriander powder, red chilli powder, and Zenzaika Chhole Masala.
7. Add curd and mix well.
8. Add boiled chhole with water.
9. Simmer for 10–12 minutes.
10. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.

recipes.name: TANDOORI CHICKEN
recipes.description: Juicy and flavorful Tandoori Chicken made with Zenzaika Tandoori Chicken Masala
instructions: 1. Clean chicken and make cuts.
2. Apply salt and lemon juice, rest for 15 minutes.
3. Mix curd, ginger garlic paste, and Zenzaika Tandoori Chicken Masala.
4. Coat chicken evenly and marinate for 2–4 hours.
5. Grill or roast until cooked and slightly charred.
6. Serve hot with onion and lemon.

recipes.name: PANEER TIKKA
recipes.description: Creamy and smoky Paneer Tikka made with Zenzaika Paneer Tikka Masala
instructions: 1. Mix curd, ginger garlic paste, and masala.
2. Add paneer and vegetables, coat well.
3. Marinate for 30–60 minutes.
4. Skewer and grill or roast until slightly charred.
5. Serve hot with chutney.

recipes.name: MUMBAI PAV BHAJI
recipes.description: Street-style Mumbai Pav Bhaji made with Zenzaika Pav Bhaji Masala
instructions: 1. Heat butter and sauté onions.
2. Add ginger garlic paste.
3. Add tomato puree and cook well.
4. Add vegetables and mash thoroughly.
5. Add Zenzaika Pav Bhaji Masala and spices.
6. Cook till thick and flavorful.
7. Garnish with butter and coriander.
8. Serve hot with pav.

recipes.name: MISAL PAV
recipes.description: Spicy and tangy Maharashtrian Misal Pav made with Zenzaika Misal Pav Masala
instructions: 1. Cook sprouts until soft.
2. Heat oil and sauté onions.
3. Add ginger garlic paste and tomatoes.
4. Add Zenzaika Misal Pav Masala and spices.
5. Add sprouts and cook with water.
6. Simmer till flavorful.
7. Serve with farsan, onion, and pav.

recipes.name: KARAHI CHICKEN
recipes.description: Rich and aromatic Karahi Chicken made with Zenzaika Karahi Chicken Masala
instructions: 1. Heat oil and add chicken pieces.
2. Cook till lightly browned.
3. Add ginger garlic paste.
4. Add tomatoes and cook till soft.
5. Add Zenzaika Karahi Chicken Masala.
6. Cook on medium heat till oil separates.
7. Add green chillies and coriander.
8. Serve hot.
